bird.name: Bicolored antpitta
bird.summary: The bicolored antpitta (Grallaria rufocinerea) is a species of bird in the family Grallariidae. It is found in Colombia and Ecuador.

locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

relations.subject: Bicolored antpitta
relations.evidence: It is found in the temperate zone, where it primarily inhabits the floor and understory of humid montane cloudforest as high as treeline

relations.subject: Bicolored antpitta
relations.evidence: "The species is threatened by deforestation for agriculture and human settlement
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
